shortDescription: Sleek 1-bedroom apartment in a boutique Yonge-Eglinton building with rooftop terrace access.
fullDescription: Welcome to 15 Erskine Avenue, Unit 2208 in the vibrant Yonge-Eglinton neighbourhood. This contemporary apartment features a thoughtfully designed layout that maximises natural light. The main living area boasts an open-concept design with pot lights and a cosy gas fireplace. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. The 1 bedrooms are well-proportioned, with the primary suite featuring a walk-in closet and updated ensuite. Additional highlights include in-suite laundry, ample storage, and energy-efficient mechanicals. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Steps to TTC subway and streetcar
